Query.Sql: ALTER TABLE merchant_statement ADD COLUMN sms_balance DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
Query.RollBack: ALTER TABLE merchant_statement DROP COLUMN sms_balance

Query.Sql: ALTER TABLE merchant_sms ADD COLUMN send_time DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
Query.RollBack: ALTER TABLE merchant_sms DROP COLUMN send_time

Query.Sql: ALTER TABLE merchant_sms ADD COLUMN total_amount DOUBLE NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
Query.RollBack: ALTER TABLE merchant_sms DROP COLUMN total_amount
